meta.question: In which model can we find a task named 'Submit Onlin eApplication'?
meta.finalAnswer: The task named 'Submit Online Application' (matching your query 'Submit Onlin eApplication') can be found in the model named **"A2 Section 1 choreo"**.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type ?comment WHERE {
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Submit Onlin eApplication")))
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem rdfs:comment ?comment . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type ?comment WHERE {
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Submit")))
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem rdfs:comment ?comment . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model ?modelName WHERE {
  ?task bbo:name "Submit Online Application" .
  ?task tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
}
LIMIT 10

request.reason: Found the task "Submit Online Application" (matching the user's query with typo "Submit Onlin eApplication") in model "A2 Section 1 choreo". The query returned exactly one model containing this task.
